Abarnaa04.resume_text:
ABARNAA R
abarnaa2006 @gmail.com
 
8925154227
 
LinkedIn.com/Abarnaa
 
github.com/Abarnaa04
 
EDUCATION
B.Tech Artificial Intelligence & Data Science
KGISL Institute of Technology
2024 – 2028
Coimbatore
RELEVANT COURSEWORK
• Artificial Intelligence     • Database Management      • Operating Systems             • AI Algorithms
• Computer Networks      • Object-Oriented Prog.       • Research Methodology      • Web Development
EXPERIENCE
•UI/UX Optimization: Designed user flows improving task completion rate by 25% in Figma to streamline 
navigation and improve task completion rates.
•Interactive Prototyping: Developed responsive prototypes in Adobe XD, enabling stakeholders to visualize 
end-to-end user journeys before development.
•Research-Led Design: Conducted user research and applied accessibility and typography principles to resolve 
pain points and enhance interface engagement.
•Cross-Platform Consistency: Executed responsive design projects to ensure a seamless and consistent user 
experience across mobile and desktop platforms.
PROJECTS
EcoSign – Sign Language Communication System | Python, Flask, AI/ML                                           February 2026
•Developed a Flask-based web app translating sign language to text for inclusive communication.
•Achieved 90%+ accuracy in real-time gesture recognition using Computer Vision and AI/ ML.
•Implemented optimized backend processing to ensure fast and seamless translation for users.
•Designed a streamlined interface to bridge communication gaps for hearing and speech-impaired individuals.
Diet Planner Application | Python, HTML, CSS, SQLite                                                                            October 2025
•Built a Python application to automate personalized meal planning based on user health metrics.
•Engineered precise logic for calorie calculation and balanced nutritional distribution.
•Enabled dynamic plan updates, allowing users to modify inputs for real-time adjustments.
•Targeted health goals like weight loss and maintenance through automated diet strategies.
Rental Website | Python, Flask, SQLite                                                                                                        December 2024 
•Developed a full-stack rental platform for efficient item listing and management.
•Built robust search and filtering features based on location, category, and availability.
•Engineered efficient backend routing using Flask to handle high-frequency user requests.
•Integrated an SQLite database to securely manage user data and rental records.
Sales Dashboard | Microsoft Excel                                                                                                                May 2025 
•Developed an interactive Excel dashboard to visualize complex sales trends.
•Reduced data analysis time by 30% using advanced pivot tables and charts.
•Tracked critical KPIs to facilitate faster, data-driven decision-making.
Cloud-Based Scalable Web Architecture | AWS                                                                                        August 2025   
• Designed a scalable cloud architecture using VPC with public and private subnets
• Implemented load balancing using Application Load Balancer (ALB)
• Enabled auto scaling using Auto Scaling Group (ASG) for traffic handling
• Deployed highly available EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones
TECHNICAL SKILLS
•Core Languages: Java, Python, C, HTML, CSS.
•Design & UI/UX: Figma, Adobe XD.
•Frameworks & DevOps: Flask, Git, GitHub, AWS (EC2, VPC, ALB, ASG), Jenkins, Linux.
LEADERSHIP / EXTRACURRICULAR
Rotaract Club – Member
•Contributed to managing the club’s digital presence through website updates and social 
media, and assisted in designing promotional content to improve engagement.  
July 2025–Present
rackgisl
•Collaborated with teams such as Club Service and International Service
Sports Achievements
•Active athlete specializing in long jump and 100m sprint, with participation in multiple 
intercollegiate events.
•Secured top positions in competitions and represented school in athletic meets, 
demonstrating speed, agility, and teamwork.
